series_metadata.series_description: Updates and changes in COSMOS. Our COSMOS system enables us to automate nearly all database functions with a single, Web-enabled system. COSMOS eliminates the traditional paper forms used by state insurance agencies by managing information on carriers, agencies, and agent producers in one integrated Oracle database.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office 2 years; then destroy. ; Electronic: In office 2 years; then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
